summary: Integrate Field Monitor vendor tier into Talent Flow for LinkedIn public profile change detection. Add bridge logic that reads field_monitor.check_log vendor-tier changes, fires EVENT_TALENTFLOW_MOVE into the existing movement engine without modifying that engine, seed 100 LinkedIn URLs from people.people_master into field_monitor.url_registry/field_state, and update pipeline.md plus SCHEMA.md.
routing_notes: Reissued from planner intake talent-flow-linkedin-87eaea35-04db-4f23-bf8c-d871668bdb3e.json. Supersedes the earlier DB-only framing by carrying the full code, DB seed, and documentation scope through to Builder.

constraints: Do not modify existing movement engine (movement_engine.py, state_machine.py)
field_monitor.* bridge reads only; never writes
Kill switches KILL_TALENT_FLOW_MONITOR and KILL_LINKEDIN_SEED enforced
Depends on field_monitor schema being deployed first
